subject: Supply Prices fwd to John.
body:
Here’s a *clean, professional chart* of your items — formatted for quoting,
ordering, or inserting into a PO.
------------------------------
*📦 SUPPLY CHART* *PAPER*
Qty Item # Description Specs Pack Size Price
1 *PF‑230* Epson Thermal Rolls 3 1/8" × 230', Phenol‑Free 50 rolls *$124.10*
1 *13‑305* Epson Impact Bond Rolls 3" One‑Ply × 165' 50 rolls *$59.00*
1 *CC‑235* Epson TM‑U220 Two‑Ply Rolls 3" Two‑Ply (0047) 50 rolls *$76.00*
1 *15‑741* Credit Card Machine Rolls 2.25" × 74' (5061) 50 rolls *$39.00*
------------------------------
*INK / RIBBONS*
Qty Item # Description Printer Model Pack Size Price
1 *62245* Black/Red Ribbon Epson TM‑220 Series Per Dozen *$42.00*
1 *67240* Black/Red Ribbon Star SP700 Series Per Dozen *$52.00*
------------------------------

If you want, I can also generate:
• A *total order cost*
• A *margin/profit calculator*
• A *customer‑facing quote sheet*

Just tell me what you want next.
